rulings.Case Title: LINDA L. BROWN et al VS. CLAY HILL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion To Strike Punitive Damages
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, JUNE 26, 2008 LINE 4. DEFENDANT CLAY HILL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION'S Motion To Strike Punitive Damages IS CONTINUED TO JULY 24, 2008. THE COURT REQUIRES THAT THE MOVING PARTY IS TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH A SET OF COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR PAPERS. WHEN SUBMITTING THE DUPLICATE COPIES, PLEASE PROVIDE A COVER LETTER TO THE COURT REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE SO THAT THE COURTESY COPIES WON'T BE MISPLACED WHEN RECEIVED. =(302/PHA)
